title: DimensionFilter
description: A filter on a specific dimension.

operator.description: How to filter. The contains operator performs a case-insensitive substring match. The equals operator performs a case-sensitive exact match. The notContains and notEquals operators are the negations of contains and equals respectively. The includingRegex and excludingRegex operators use RE2 syntax.

expression.description: The value to filter on. For country, use the 3-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3). For device, use DESKTOP, MOBILE, or TABLET.
